regime_note: TRAILING STOP ACTIVATED. Gold spiked to $4,871 (broke $4,859 trigger), SL moved to $4,820 (breakeven). Risk-free trade now. USDJPY 4 pips from invalidation. GIFT Nifty +1-1.5% gap-up on crude crash. India opens 09:15.

open_positions.thesis: Gold broke day high ($4,817.75) while WTI dumps -4.4%. Divergence signals macro hedging demand beyond energy fear. Fresh breakout with geopolitical backdrop (Hormuz tense, dollar weak). R:R 2.38:1.
open_positions.trailing_note: ACTIVATED at $4,871. SL moved to $4,820 (breakeven). Next: tighten SL to $4,840 if Gold breaks above $4,871 again. Trail $30 below price.
open_positions.management_rules: Trailing ACTIVE. SL at $4,820 (breakeven). Risk = $0. Trail $30 below price — if Gold makes new high above $4,871, tighten SL to $4,840+. Let it run toward $4,900 TP.

watchlist.size_plan: Calculate via risk_guard at entry time
watchlist.thesis: Yen safe haven bid accelerating — USD/JPY down -0.42% and grinding lower. Aligns with Gold strength (both risk-off). Day low 158.598 is the trigger. Break = fresh momentum.
watchlist.invalidation: If USD/JPY bounces above 159.00, cancel this setup.

watchlist.trigger: Bounce to $89-90 zone (revised down from $91-92 after further dump to $85)

watchlist.invalidation: If WTI reclaims $91 (former bounce zone), setup is dead.

watchlist.trigger: Break above $76,100 (today's high) — NOT active, momentum fading

watchlist.thesis: Dollar weakness building (+0.34%). EUR/USD creeping toward day high. Break above 1.1811 = confirmed dollar sell. Aligns with Gold strength and yen bid.

market_context.session: Tokyo mid-morning. India pre-market 08:30, open 09:15 (F&O expiry + Reliance Q4). GIFT Nifty +1-1.5% gap-up.
key_events_upcoming: Apr 15: India market reopens (F&O expiry + Reliance Q4)
market_context.hormuz_status: MAJOR DE-ESCALATION: Trump says Iran contacted Washington, ready to deal. WTI crashed from $89 to $85.12. Round 2 Pakistan talks expected within days. Iran mulling Hormuz shipment pause. Ceasefire holds to Apr 22.
market_context.dominant_theme: De-escalation pricing holds overnight. WTI steady ~$89.6, Gold grinding $4,831 (+1.9%), yen bid intact. Tokyo session — USDJPY near trigger (158.76 vs 158.60 break level). No new catalysts overnight.
